improvement_bullets: Managed international travel itineraries for C-level executives, including complex visa procurement and documentation, ensuring seamless global mobility for business development.
Provided high-level administrative support within high-pressure environments, consistently mirroring the rigorous operational standards of the financial and professional services industries.
Streamlined executive expense reporting and reconciliation using robust digital systems, ensuring 100% policy compliance for corporate credit card usage and reimbursements.
Facilitated full-cycle recruitment support for executive leadership, coordinating high-volume interview schedules and maintaining confidential hiring pipelines.

Developed sophisticated spreadsheet-based reporting systems to analyze cross-functional departmental performance, providing executive leadership with actionable data insights for strategic decision-making.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Executive Assistant opportunity with Lu Guasco & Co. I am interested in this opportunity because of your firm’s reputation for operational excellence and its commitment to high-level strategic growth within the financial services sector. What interests me about working for Lu Guasco & Co. is your firm's rigorous approach to high-stakes decision-making and client service, which excites me as it mirrors the professional environment where I thrive. I believe my mastery of complex calendar management and my ability to navigate the intricacies of international travel and visa coordination would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my career, I have approached problems with a proactive, anticipatory mindset. In fact, while managing schedules for a C-suite team at Direct Clean Solutions, I encountered a recurring conflict where last-minute international expansion meetings were hindered by inefficient travel documentation processes. I took the initiative to establish a centralized digital tracking system for global visa requirements and executive preferences. As a result, I eliminated travel disruptions entirely and reduced booking lead time by 30%, directly supporting the executive team’s ability to conduct international business without friction. Ultimately, I know that the Executive Assistant role at Lu Guasco & Co. would allow me to bring my high-level project management skills to support your internal and external stakeholder communications. Additionally, my role as an Executive Assistant enabled me to develop my financial reporting and expense management skills. By implementing automated coding systems and rigorous reconciliation processes for invoice and expense processing, I was able to reduce administrative overhead by 20% while maintaining 99% accuracy. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in data analysis and financial reporting in working on the expense management and document preparation tasks at Lu Guasco & Co. I know that my discretion in handling sensitive information and my capacity for managing complex, fast-paced workflows align with what it takes to succeed at the Executive Assistant role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Millieann Velez
